title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 511.770 - Citation of law — purpose
text:
511.770.  Citation of law — purpose. — 1.  Sections 511.770 to 511.787 may be cited as the "Uniform Foreign Country Money-Judgments Recognition Act".
  2.  Sections 511.770 to 511.787 shall be so construed as to effectuate its general purpose to make uniform the law of those states which enact it.
(L. 1984 H.B. 957 §§ 9, 8)
